cards.title: Feynman Technique
cards.content: Explain the concept of '{{input}}' as if I am 12 years old. Use powerful analogies and avoid complex jargon.

cards.title: Generate a Quiz
cards.content: I am studying '{{input}}'. Give me a 5-question multiple choice quiz to test my knowledge, and provide the answer key at the very end.

cards.title: Create Study Guide
cards.content:
Create a structured, 1-week study plan to master the following topic from scratch:

{{input}}
